'''Hoggon's starship''' was an ungainly looking transport owned by spacer [[Hoggon]]. He used it to transport [[Ulic Qel-Droma/Legends|Ulic Qel-Droma]] to first [[Yavin 4/Legends|Yavin 4]] and then [[Rhen Var/Legends|Rhen Var]]. Hoggon then flew in it to [[Exis Station/Legends|Exis Station]], where [[Vima Sunrider]] stowed away on the ship. Upon discovering her, Hoggon took her to Rhen Var. Hoggon later used the ship to take [[Sylvar]] to Rhen Var.

==Appearances==
